issues.detail: Text is a truncated poem fragment ('Du häßlicher Vogel, wirst du einst') and 'translation' field contains German text from the next line ('Und hacke dir ab die Krallen') — not actually a translation. This example is broken.

All annotations reference English text forms (The, storm, covered, the, entire, house) instead of the German sentence ('Der Sturm hat das ganze Haus abgedeckt.'). Annotations were generated from the translation, not the source.
All annotations reference English text forms (Pope, Benedict, XVI, unexpectedly, resigned, etc.) instead of the German sentence. Annotations were generated from the translation.
All annotations reference English text forms (The, bear, was, already, old) instead of the German sentence ('Der Bär war schon alt.'). Annotations were generated from the translation.
All annotations reference English text forms (resisted, urging, offered, lead, training, offspring) instead of the German sentence. Annotations were generated from the translation.
Annotations reference English forms (go, step, once, more) instead of German forms (gehen, Schritt, einmal, noch). Annotations were generated from the translation.

Annotations use English lemmas: 'play' instead of 'Drama', 'opposite word' instead of 'Gegenteil', 'pope' instead of 'Papst', 'which (nominative)' instead of 'das', 'that' instead of 'der', 'which' and 'the (feminine)' instead of 'die'. Annotations were generated from translation text.

Annotations use English lemmas throughout: 'wheat' instead of 'Weizen', 'pile' instead of 'Haufen', 'shovel' instead of 'Schaufel', 'person' instead of 'Person', 'mixture' instead of 'Mischung', 'watering can' instead of 'Gießkanne', 'rose' (lowercase) instead of 'Rose', 'height' instead of 'Höhe', 'sowing' instead of 'Saat'. Annotations were generated from translation text.
Block annotation has gloss_hint 'pad' (sense 2: paper pad) but the sentence is about philately — should match sense 8 'stamp block'. The gloss_hint should be 'stamp block'.
Block annotation has gloss_hint 'block (solid piece)' (sense 1) but the sentence defines a programming block structure (sense 9). The gloss_hint should be 'block structure'.

Translation says 'The mayor has moved again' but the context (military — 'Balka hinter Gumrak' is a WWII Stalingrad reference) indicates OB = Oberbefehlshaber (commander-in-chief), not Oberbürgermeister (mayor). Also annotation lemma says 'Oberbürgermeister' which is wrong for this sense.

Translation says 'Pass the order on to the mayor!' but 'Befehl' (military command) suggests OB = Oberbefehlshaber or Oberbootsmann (military context), not Oberbürgermeister. Should be 'Pass the command on to the OB (commander)!'

Translation 'What do you find so special about the green boy?' misses the figurative meaning. Should be 'What do you even see in that inexperienced boy?' — 'grüner Junge' means an inexperienced/immature young man.
Annotation for 'schnitt' has wrong lemma 'schnitten' — should be 'schneiden'.
Annotation for 'sie' has absurd gloss_hint 'trumpet solo' — should be null (pronoun, not annotated as content word). Also 'soll' has gloss_hint 'task' which is wrong — sollen means 'should'.
Annotation for 'deckten' has lemma 'decken' but the verb in context is 'abdecken' (separable: 'deckten...ab'). Lemma should be 'abdecken'.

Translation 'Today afternoon, we cover the trench.' is unnatural English. Should be 'This afternoon we'll cover the trench.' Also annotation for 'decken' should have lemma 'abdecken' (separable: 'decken...ab').
Annotation for 'decken' has lemma 'decken' but the verb is 'abdecken' (separable: 'decken...ab'). Lemma should be 'abdecken'.
Rose annotation has gloss_hint 'rose' which would match sense 1 (rose plant), but this example is about sense 4 (wattle/rooster). The gloss_hint should be 'wattle (rooster)' or 'wattle'.

Rose annotation has gloss_hint 'rose (plant)' but this example could refer to erysipelas (sense 7) or shingles (sense 8) — 'Meine Rose ist kaum auszuhalten' ('My shingles/erysipelas is hardly bearable'). A plant rose being 'unbearable' makes no sense in context.

gloss_en_full says 'I cannot provide a translation for this entry. The gloss Plural 1: is incomplete...' — should be null or a meaningful description. The gloss 'Plural 1:' is just a section header, not a real definition.

gloss_en_full says 'I cannot provide a translation for this entry. The gloss Plural 2: is incomplete...' — should be null or a meaningful description. The gloss 'Plural 2:' is just a section header, not a real definition.
All 19 senses have gloss_en: null — no short English glosses at all. This word needs translation.
All 10 senses have gloss_en: null — no short English glosses at all. This word needs translation.
Ansatz annotation has gloss_hint 'approach' (sense 8) but the math context ('mathematischen Ansatz') should be 'ansatz (math)' (sense 4). The gloss_hint should be 'ansatz (math)'.

Text is just 'bildhaft:' (meaning 'figuratively:') which is not a real example sentence — it's a label/header. Translation 'Vivid:' is inaccurate; 'bildhaft' in this context means 'figuratively' or 'metaphorically'.
